layoutAnalysis.layoutSummary:

- Total pages: 3
- Total text blocks: 6
- Total images: 2
- Potential tables: 1

Structure Type: mixed-document

Page-by-page analysis:

Page 2: mixed layout with 1 text block, 0 images, 1 table candidate
Page 3: text-dense layout with 1 text block, 1 image

test-text-extraction.text: Sample OCR text content extracted from PDF document. This document contains multiple pages with various content types including text, images, and tables. The OCR processing has successfully extracted the content with good accuracy.

ocrPostProcessing.processedText: Sample OCR text content extracted from PDF document. This document contains multiple pages with various content types including text, images, and tables. The OCR processing has successfully extracted the content with good accuracy.

improvements.description: Rejoined hyphenated words at line breaks

test-full-integration.text: Sample OCR text content extracted from PDF document. This document contains multiple pages with various content types including text, images, and tables. The OCR processing has successfully extracted the content with good accuracy.

layoutAnalysisSchema.success: boolean - whether layout analysis was successful
layoutAnalysisSchema.totalPages: number - total number of pages analyzed
layoutAnalysisSchema.structureType: one of: structured-document, image-heavy-document, text-dense-document, mixed-document, sparse-text, image-heavy, balanced, fragmented

layoutAnalysisPageSchema.textBlocks: array of text block objects with text, lines, startLine, endLine
layoutAnalysisPageSchema.images: array of image objects with positional data
layoutAnalysisPageSchema.estimatedLayoutType: one of: image-heavy, sparse-text, text-dense, fragmented, balanced

ocrPostProcessingSchema.improvements: array of improvement objects with type, description, impact
ocrPostProcessingSchema.processingSteps: array of strings describing processing steps

tableExtractionSchema.type: string - type of table (markdown, tab-separated, column-aligned, etc.)

imageExtractionSchema.data: string - base64 encoded image data or data URL
imageExtractionSchema.name: string - image identifier
